hardRules: Do not invent awards, licences, review counts, guarantees, years in business, or emergency availability.
Use supplied business photos when present; do not use unrelated stock images.
Prefer short specific copy over vague promotional copy.
Preserve buildability and Vercel deployment assumptions.
Fix mobile first: no horizontal overflow, readable text, obvious CTA.
tokenPolicy: Do not send full files to every agent.
Pass compact JSON briefs and paths instead of pasted code when possible.
Use Haiku for classification, copy triage, and simple strategy.
Use Sonnet only for visual design, frontend refactor, and QA repair.
Persist site-plan.json so later agents read one compact source of truth.
